title: gymnanthemum glaberrimum
intro: Gymnanthemum glaberrimum, also known as the African blue basil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum glaberrimum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Gymnanthemum glaberrimum can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
